scenario_desc: Customer wants to replace their non-active card with existing address

goal.description: Agent identified the customer's name successfully.
Show the customer's all non-active card numbers successfully.
Agent found out the existing address and postal code of the customer
Inform the customer that the replacement card will be sent to their address

selected_card_number.description: randomly select a card number option from the customer's card list

shipping_address.description: use the existing shipping address on file

postal_code.description: use the existing postal code on file

user_simulation_policy: Send messages that contain a spelling mistake or typo as a careless customer would.
Send messages with abusive words or slang terms as a frustrated customer would.
